semantic.role: Type definition for loaded units from the spine index.
responsibilities: Define the LoadedUnit interface that pairs a SpineUnit with its line count, representing a unit loaded from the index for further processing.
outOfScope: Any runtime loading logic; this file only declares the data structure.
invariants: No function or class exists in this module; contract is purely structural.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide the data contract for loaded units consumed by infra or service layers.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: ArchSpine v1.0.0 — Initial release establishing the core data model for loaded units.

publicSurface.description: Interface representing a loaded spine unit from the index, including the unit data and its line count for processing or display.
